zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Thomas Holand於大約1314年出生在英國藍卡爾武普 霍蘭時，他的父親Robert de Holand III38歲，母親Maud la Zouche28歲。他於1340年與Joan of Kent在英國肯特結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他於1346年登記服兵役。他去世於1360年12月26日在法國豪-諾門迪瑟-馬利盧享年47歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Thomas Holand于大约1314年出生在英国藍卡爾武普 霍蘭时，他的父亲Robert de Holand III38岁，母亲Maud la Zouche28岁。他于1340年与Joan of Kent在英国肯特结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他于1346年登记服兵役。他去世于1360年12月26日在法国豪-諾門迪瑟-馬利盧享年47岁。

nameMeanings.name: Holand
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Holland  .
Norwegian: habitational name from about twenty farmsteads so named, composed of Old Norse hár ‘high’ + land ‘land, field’, denoting a high-lying farm.

variants.name: Holland
meanings: English, German, Dutch, Danish, Norwegian, Swedish, French, and Jewish (Ashkenazic): habitational name from Holland, a province of the Netherlands.

English: habitational name from Downholland or Upholland (Lancashire), Hulland (Derbyshire), the Parts of Holland, one of the three administrative subdivisions of Lincolnshire, any of the four places called Hoyland (southern Yorkshire), and possibly Great and Little Holland (Essex). The placenames all derive from Old English hōh ‘heel, spur of land’ + land ‘land’.

English: habitational name either from Hoeland (Farm) in Bury (Sussex), or from Holland's Barn in Albourne (Sussex). The placename in Bury has the same etymology as in 1 above, while the placename in Albourne may derive from Old English hol ‘hole, hollow’ + land ‘land’.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Thomas Holand was born about 1314, in Up Holland, Lancashire, England, his father, Robert de Holand III, was 38 and his mother, Maud la Zouche, was 28. He married Joan of Kent in 1340, in Kent, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He registered for military service in 1346. He died on 26 December 1360, in Rouen, Seine-Maritime, Upper Normandy, France, at the age of 47.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Thomas Holand est né environ 1314, à Up Holland, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Robert de Holand III, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Maud la Zouche, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Joan of Kent en 1340, à Kent, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1346. Il est décédé le 26 décembre 1360, à Rouen, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, France, à l’âge de 47 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Thomas Holand um 1314 in Up Holland, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert de Holand III 38 und seine Mutter Maud la Zouche 28. Er hat 1340 in Kent, England Joan of Kent geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er hat sich 1346 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb am 26. Dezember 1360 im Alter von 47 Jahren in Rouen, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Holand è nato il circa 1314 nel Up Holland, Lancashire, England, il suo padre, Robert de Holand III, aveva 38 anni e il suo madre, Maud la Zouche, aveva 28 anni. Lui sposato Joan of Kent nel 1340, nel Kent, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1346. Morì il 26 dicembre 1360, nel Rouen, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, Francia, all'età di 47 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Holandが約1314年にイギリスランカシュアイアウップ ホーランドで生まれた時，父Robert de Holand IIIは38歳，母Maud la Zoucheは28歳であった。1340年にイギリスケントでJoan of Kentと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1346年に兵役登録をした。彼は1360年12月26日にフランスハウテ-ノーマンディセアイネ-マリティメロウンで47歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Holand(이)가 대략 1314년 영국 랭카실르 업 홀랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert de Holand III(은)는 38세였고, 그의 어머니 Maud la Zouche(은)는 28세였다. 그는 1340년 영국 켄트에서 Joan of Kent(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1346년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1360년 12월 26일 프랑스 하테-노먼디 세이인-마이팀 루언에서 47세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Winchester, Hampshire, England: Winchester, Hāmtūnscīr, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Holand nasceu aproximadamente 1314, em Up Holland, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert de Holand III, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Maud la Zouche, tinha 28 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan of Kent em 1340, em Kent, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1346. Ele faleceu em 26 de dezembro de 1360, em Rouen, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, França, com 47 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Thomas Holand родился около 1314 г. в местности уп холланд, ланкашир, Англия, его отцу по имени Robert de Holand III было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Maud la Zouche, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan of Kent в 1340 г. в местности кэнт, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. В 1346 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер 26 декабря 1360 г. в местности роуен, сине-маритим, хауте-норманди, Франция в возрасте 47 лет.

sm.From 1350 to 1359: mai le 1350 e o'o I le 1359

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Thomas Holand nació aproximadamente 1314, en Up Holland, Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert de Holand III, tenía 38 años y su mamá, Maud la Zouche, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Joan of Kent en 1340, en Kent, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1346. Murió el 26 de diciembre de 1360, en Rouen, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, Francia, a la edad de 47 años.
